parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "temperature": 0.3,
  "max_tokens": 256,
  "response_format": { "type": "json_object" },
  "messages": [
    { "role": "system", "content": "You are a search query formatter. Output ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown or explanation." },
    { "role": "user", "content": {{ JSON.stringify('User intent: ' + ($('Webhook').item.json.body.type || 'any') + '
Context: ' + JSON.stringify($json.context) + '

Return JSON: {"types":"comma_separated_ola_types","radius":number_in_meters,"language":"en"}

Rules:
- Pick 1-3 Ola Maps place types from: cafe, restaurant, bar, park, gym, museum, art_gallery, shopping_mall, bookstore, tourist_attraction, night_club, bakery
- coffee intent => types=cafe,bakery
- food => types=restaurant,cafe
- outdoor => types=park,tourist_attraction
- bar => types=bar,night_club
- shopping => types=shopping_mall
- fitness => types=gym,park
- any => pick based on interests, bio, timeOfDay
- radius: 1500 (urban default)
- morning/afternoon: favor cafe, park, restaurant
- evening/night: favor bar, restaurant, night_club') }} }
  ]
}
